jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Mixpanel is the leading event-based product analytics platform that helps companies understand how users engage with their products. Our customers' teams use Mixpanel to ship better products faster.</p><p>As an <strong>Account Manager<em> </em></strong>, you’ll own a book of mid-market customers across North America, partnering with Customer Success and Solutions Engineering to drive expansion and renewals on the Mixpanel Analytics flagship.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Insights
jobs.content: <p>Mixpanel’s <strong>Insights</strong> team is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to build the exploratory analysis dashboard that powers ad-hoc data queries from product, growth, and analytics teams. You'll work across Go, React, and ClickHouse to ship dashboard experiences used by thousands of analytics teams every day.</p><p>You’ll partner with Product, Design, and the Mixpanel Data Pipelines team to drive a roadmap that scales the analytics flagship to enterprise customers across North America, EMEA, and APAC. The role is hybrid in our Bangalore engineering hub.</p>
